title: ChangeBrief
description: SignalScribe's structured interpretation of a ChangeArtifact, including gate 1-3 decisions. Produced by the SignalScribe agent; consumed by the orchestrator which fans it out to BUAtlas per candidate BU.

brief_id.description: UUID v4 identifier for this ChangeBrief. Distinct from change_id; one change_id may produce one brief_id (currently 1:1 in v1).

change_id.description: Matches the ChangeArtifact's change_id. Enables traceability back to the originating artifact.

produced_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when SignalScribe produced this brief.

version.description: SignalScribe agent version at time of production.

summary.description: 1-2 sentence plain-English summary of the change, suitable for a busy BU head to scan in 5 seconds.

before.description: Description of the prior state before this change. Use 'unknown' if genuinely unknown.

after.description: Description of the new state after this change.

impact_areas.description: Functional areas impacted by this change. Freeform strings in v1; will align with BU registry taxonomy in a later release.

status.description: Gate 2 verdict on timing. 'ripe' means ready to communicate now. 'held_until' means wait until a specified date. 'held_indefinite' means hold until a trigger fires. 'already_shipped' means change has gone out without prior communication.

start_date.description: ISO-8601 date when rollout begins or began. Null when not yet known.

ramp.description: Rollout ramp description extracted from the artifact. Null when not specified.

reevaluate_at.description: ISO-8601 date to re-evaluate this brief for ripeness. Null when not held.

reevaluate_trigger.description: Human-readable description of the event that should trigger re-evaluation. Null when not held.

required_actions.description: Concrete actions required of BU stakeholders. Empty array if none.

risks.description: Identified risks associated with this change. Empty array if none.

mitigations.description: Known mitigations for the identified risks. Empty array if none.

faq.description: Anticipated questions and answers. Empty array if none.

sources.description: Source citations supporting claims in this brief. Each citation traces a claim to a specific artifact passage.

quote.description: Short verbatim snippet from the source artifact supporting the claim. Must not contain PII, PHI, or secrets.

confidence_score.description: SignalScribe's aggregate confidence in the brief as a whole. 0 = no confidence; 1 = fully certain. See decision criteria for threshold semantics.

decisions.description: Gate decisions made by SignalScribe (gates 1, 2, 3) in the order they were made. Each entry records the verb, reason, confidence, and agent version.

open_questions.description: Specific, answerable questions for human review. Populated when gate 3 returns NEED_CLARIFICATION. Aim for ≤3 sharp questions.

escalation_reason.description: Human-readable reason for escalation. Populated when any gate returns ESCALATE. Null otherwise. Must not contain PII or internal secrets.
